goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'friday' and should depart from 'london liverpool street'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 15:15'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'travel time', and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should be in the 'cheap' price range.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'area'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on friday and should depart from london liverpool street
The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 15:15
Make sure you get train ID, travel time, and departure time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should be in the cheap price range
Make sure you get address and area
